# Sovereignty overlay (funding short form)

Use this in every proposal that touches data, AI decisions, or whenua.

## Te Mana Raraunga (essentials)

| Principle | Proposal language |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Ownership** | Māori data belongs to Māori collectives; CAT is steward not owner |
| **Control** | Access purpose-limited; dual-key / cultural veto where agreed |
| **Access** | Logged, audited, restricted by purpose |
| **Possession** | Physical/logical residency in Aotearoa; edge-first processing |

## Privacy Act 2020 (essentials)

- Collection only for stated purpose (IPP1)  
- Secure storage (IPP4) — encryption at rest/transit on edge and hub  
- Access/correction pathways (IPP5/6)  
- Use/disclosure limits (IPP10/11)  
- DSAR: **20 working days** target  
- Breach notify Privacy Commissioner: **72 hours** target  

## MBIE Responsible AI + Algorithm Charter

- Safety-by-design  
- Explainability + audit trail for agent actions  
- **HITL** for high-risk decisions  
- Fairness / non-discrimination  
- Appeal / human review pathway for automated decisions affecting people  

## SOC 2 Type II (roadmap honesty)

State **framework deployed / implementation in progress** unless external audit complete. Cite 225-item matrix as readiness work, not certification.

## HITL gates for funded projects

| Event | Gate |
| :--- | :--- |
| Submit grant application | Grant lead + finance |
| Name iwi/hapū/marae | Cultural Advisor |
| Process Māori / health data | Compliance + cultural |
| Capital allocation &gt;$50k (internal) | CFO + CISO |
| Production deploy of funded agent features | Diamond security review |

## Anti-patterns in proposals

- “Cloud AI for farms” without residency controls  
- Tokenistic Māori branding without partnership  
- Claiming full SOC 2 Type II attestation prematurely  
- Ignoring rural offline constraint (undermines product thesis)
